allow:
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
from nlp_topic_modeling.lda import train_topic_model
from nlp_topic_modeling.data.loaders import load_MOROCO

# Load a sample of MOROCO data
df, _ = load_MOROCO\(split=''train''\)
df_sample = df.sample\(500, random_state=42\)

print\(f''Training on {len\(df_sample\)} documents...''\)

# Train topic model
pipeline = train_topic_model\(
    df_sample,
    n_topics=6,
    max_iter=50,  # Reduced for speed
    show_progress=True
\)

print\(''\\n=== Topics ===''\)
pipeline.print_topics\(n_words=8\)

print\(f''\\nVocabulary size: {pipeline.get_vocabulary_size\(\)}''\)
print\(''Integration test passed!''\)
")
